title: Inspect and clean machinery, tools and equipment to preserve biosecurity
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect and clean machinery, tools and equipment to preserve biosecurity demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect and clean machinery, tools and equipment

pcs.text: Confirm the work activity to be undertaken with supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the work activity to be undertaken with supervisor.
